content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: hdr_override:sess_only->spoof(x-user-id) ⇒ "public_api_gateway|x-user-id||401"
P: drop_hdr → bind_session → 401_on_missing
V: "no_hdr=>sess_only" ∧ "bad_hdr=>401"
R: ! authz_bypass ∧ ! spoof_denied_gap
A: "reject_spoof;use_session"

[AUDIT]
Treat hdr override:sess only->spoof(x-user-id) as a header auth risk, apply drop the header path, and verify spoofed requests fail.
